hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系；【FINANCE】特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹。

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
items.summary: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹
items.summary_zh: 早些时候，在 Strategy 披露出售更多所持代币后，比特币跌至 60,000 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin, XRP draw Japanese firms as weak yen drives treasury diversification
items.summary: SBI VC Trade says corporate demand for crypto is rising as a weak yen pushes firms to diversify reserves, part of a run that took its registered accounts past 2 million.
items.title_zh: 日元疲软推动资金多元化，比特币、XRP 吸引日本企业
items.summary_zh: SBI VC Trade 表示，由于日元疲软促使企业实现储备多元化，企业对加密货币的需求正在上升，其注册账户已超过 200 万。

items.title: Bitcoin’s early July bounce rides thin summer liquidity as half of supply still sits underwater: analysts
items.summary: BTC traded around $63,500 after a six-day rally as Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged weak ETF demand, while K33 said 50% of supply is at a loss.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，由于一半的供应仍处于水下，比特币7月初的反弹得益于夏季流动性稀薄
items.summary_zh: 由于 Wintermute 和 Bitfinex 表示 ETF 需求疲软，而 K33 表示 50% 的供应量处于亏损状态，因此在连续六天上涨后，BTC 交易价格约为 63,500 美元。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
items.title_zh: 克拉纳寻求美国银行牌照，以超越“先买后付”的最新举措
items.summary_zh: Klarna 加入了寻求进入传统银行系统的金融科技和加密货币公司浪潮。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Erika Kirk comes face-to-face in court with husband's alleged killer
items.summary: Charlie Kirk's widow was joined by the late US activist's family - all of whom attended court for the first time in the case.
items.title_zh: 埃里卡·柯克在法庭上与杀害丈夫的凶手面对面
items.summary_zh: 查理·柯克的遗孀与已故美国活动家的家人一起出席，他们都是此案首次出庭。

items.title: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.summary: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 特朗普证实他要求国际足联审查巴洛贡禁令
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统证实，他要求国际足联审查美国前锋福拉林·巴洛贡在世界杯上停赛一场的决定。

items.title: Estonia Won the War on Fentanyl. What Came Next Was Even Worse.
items.summary: By 2018, fentanyl overdoses in Estonia had plummeted. But powerful new drugs are appearing fast, with the authorities racing to respond.
items.title_zh: 爱沙尼亚赢得了芬太尼战争。接下来发生的事情更糟。
items.summary_zh: 到 2018 年，爱沙尼亚的芬太尼过量用药数量大幅下降。但强效新药正在迅速出现，当局也在加紧应对。

items.title: Court Upholds Le Pen’s Conviction, but Leaves a Path to Presidency
items.summary: An appeals court confirmed Marine Le Pen’s embezzlement conviction, but shortened a ban on her eligibility for elected office. That could let the French far-right leader to run for president in 2027.
items.title_zh: 法院维持勒庞的定罪，但为总统之路留出一条道路
items.summary_zh: 上诉法院确认了马琳·勒庞的贪污罪定罪，但缩短了对她当选公职资格的禁令。这可能会让这位法国极右翼领导人在 2027 年竞选总统。

items.title: How a Four-Generation Cuban Family Survives on $60 a Month
items.summary: The U.S. oil blockade has deepened a humanitarian crisis, forcing Cubans to lean on the island’s long tradition of community solidarity to provide a cushion.
items.title_zh: 古巴四代家庭如何靠每月 60 美元生存
items.summary_zh: 美国的石油封锁加深了人道主义危机，迫使古巴人依靠岛上社区团结的悠久传统来提供缓冲。

items.title: Vanguard opens search for digital assets leader in sign of evolving crypto strategy
items.summary: The new role would oversee tokenization, stablecoins and blockchain initiatives as Vanguard reassesses digital assets.
items.title_zh: 先锋集团开始寻找数字资产领导者，这是加密战略不断发展的迹象
items.summary_zh: 随着先锋集团重新评估数字资产，新角色将监督代币化、稳定币和区块链计划。

items.title: AI trade loses steam as infrastructure boom faces reality check
items.summary: Record earnings, rising competition and concerns over slowing AI spending are forcing investors to reassess one of the market's biggest trades.
items.title_zh: 基础设施繁荣面临现实检验，人工智能贸易失去动力
items.summary_zh: 创纪录的盈利、日益激烈的竞争以及对人工智能支出放缓的担忧迫使投资者重新评估市场上最大的交易之一。

items.title: Multi-trillion-dollar asset manager Vanguard hiring crypto exec to help influence market
items.summary: The firm's head of digital assets will lead Vanguard's crypto-related strategy for personal wealth clients and interact with regulators.
items.title_zh: 价值数万亿美元的资产管理公司先锋集团聘请加密货币高管来帮助影响市场
items.summary_zh: 该公司的数字资产主管将领导先锋集团针对个人财富客户的加密货币相关战略，并与监管机构互动。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: PRX Part 4: Our Data Strategy
items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领袖举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: In NATO’s Next Act, Can Europe Lead?
items.summary: The focus at a leaders’ summit in Turkey this week will be on building a new model for the alliance, as President Trump pushes to do less and pressures others do more.
items.title_zh: 在北约的下一步行动中，欧洲能发挥领导作用吗？
items.summary_zh: 本周在土耳其举行的领导人峰会的重点将是建立联盟的新模式，特朗普总统将推动减少行动，并迫使其他国家采取更多行动。

items.title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
items.summary: A newly updated agenda from the securities regulator shows so-called Reg Crypto high on its near-term list.
items.title_zh: 美国 SEC 最早将于本月提出加密货币规则，以缓解初创企业和融资问题
items.summary_zh: 证券监管机构最新更新的议程显示，所谓的“Reg Crypto”在其近期名单中名列前茅。

items.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
items.summary: Major brokerages initiated coverage on Tuesday with mostly buy ratings following the company's $75 billion June IPO.
items.title_zh: 随着 IPO 后研究的开始，分析师认为 SpaceX 有更多上涨空间
items.summary_zh: 继该公司 6 月 750 亿美元的首次公开募股 (IPO) 后，主要券商周二开始对该公司进行报道，大多给予买入评级。

items.title: EDX Markets raises $76 million in funding round led by SBI Holdings
items.summary: EDX’s model targets institutional clients by separating trading from custody through a central clearinghouse to minimize counterparty risk.
items.title_zh: EDX Markets 在 SBI Holdings 领投的一轮融资中筹集了 7600 万美元
items.summary_zh: EDX 的模式针对机构客户，通过中央清算所将交易与托管分开，以最大程度地降低交易对手风险。

items.title: Bitcoin's July gains may be fleeting as U.S. demand stays weak
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 7, 2026
items.title_zh: 由于美国需求依然疲弱，比特币 7 月的涨幅可能会转瞬即逝
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 7 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin stalls as open interest decline raises questions about rally's staying power
items.summary: BTC retreated from a two-week high of $64,500 as falling open interest and weak spot demand cast doubt on the sustainability of July's 8.4% advance.
items.title_zh: 由于未平仓合约下降，比特币陷入停滞，引发人们对反弹持久力的质疑
items.summary_zh: 比特币从两周高点 64,500 美元回落，因为未平仓合约下降和现货需求疲软让人对 7 月份 8.4% 上涨的可持续性产生怀疑。

items.title: Tether puts $20 million behind Mercado Bitcoin amid Latin America’s tokenization boom
items.summary: Mercado Bitcoin has grown from an early crypto exchange into a regulated digital financial services platform.
items.title_zh: 在拉丁美洲代币化热潮中，Tether 向 Mercado Bitcoin 投资 2000 万美元
items.summary_zh: Mercado Bitcoin 已从早期的加密货币交易所发展成为受监管的数字金融服务平台。

items.title: Gemini offers 0% stock trading in US as it looks to become ‘all-in-one financial super app’
items.summary: Gemini said it is looking to become an “all-in-one financial super app" as it launches 0% commission stock trading for eligible U.S. users.
items.title_zh: Gemini 在美国提供 0% 股票交易，希望成为“一体化金融超级应用程序”
items.summary_zh: Gemini 表示，它希望成为一款“一体化金融超级应用程序”，为符合条件的美国用户推出 0% 佣金的股票交易。

items.title: Galaxy delivers 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave as Helios bitcoin mine turns AI hub
items.summary: Galaxy delivered 133 MW of critical IT load to CoreWeave at its Helios campus, completing Phase I of the West Texas site's AI conversion.
items.title_zh: 随着 Helios 比特币矿场转变为人工智能中心，Galaxy 为 CoreWeave 提供了 133 MW 的关键 IT 负载
items.summary_zh: Galaxy 向 Helios 园区的 CoreWeave 交付了 133 MW 的关键 IT 负载，完成了西德克萨斯站点 AI 转换的第一阶段。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
items.summary: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞表示，在夏季购买这些优质、低压力的股票
items.summary_zh: 今年夏天，杰富瑞建议关注一些被人工智能动能交易抛在后面的优质股票。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.
items.title_zh: 不要放弃在波士顿新金融博物馆与人工智能亚历山大·汉密尔顿交谈的机会
items.summary_zh: 离开旧址近十年后，美国金融博物馆向公众敞开了新的大门。

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.summary_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
items.summary: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞被判有罪，但如果她佩戴标签，法院将为她竞选总统扫清道路
items.summary_zh: 全国集会领袖现在必须决定是否携带电子标签参加竞选，并稍后在电视上发表讲话。

items.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
items.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯猛烈袭击后，泽伦斯基向北约施压要求建立防空系统
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，“防空决定”应该是本周土耳其峰会的“关键成果之一”。

items.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
items.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.
items.title_zh: 涉嫌摩纳哥炸弹袭击的妇女在乌克兰被发现死亡
items.summary_zh: 一名乌克兰百万富翁在爆炸中受伤后，警方一直在追捕阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡。

items.title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
items.summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 曝光俄罗斯在乌克兰“酷刑监狱”的狱卒和官员
items.summary_zh: 前囚犯指控这些人在拘留中心实施虐待，并希望看到他们受到审判。

items.title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
items.summary: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

items.summary_zh: 随着爆炸事件的报道传来，国家电视台称叙利亚总统在总统府欢迎了马克龙。

items.title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
items.summary: Videos shared with the BBC show debris flying through the air as the storm swept through Ezhou and Huanggang in Hubei province.

items.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
items.summary: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.

items.summary_zh: 南非警方表示，他们正在调查一起谋杀未遂案，但迄今为止尚未逮捕任何人。

items.title: India's landmark Ram temple overhauls board after alleged theft of donations
items.summary: Questions have been raised over alleged theft of cash, valuable jewellery, gold and silver offered by devotees.

items.summary_zh: 人们对信徒提供的现金、贵重珠宝、金银的涉嫌盗窃行为提出了质疑。

items.title: Mass Mournings In Qom, Where Khamenei Ruled Supreme Over Iran’s Clerics
items.summary: The ceremony for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, held at a site considered sacred by many Shiites, was the latest step in a weeklong funeral organized by Iran’s government.

items.summary_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊的仪式在许多什叶派认为神圣的地方举行，这是伊朗政府组织的为期一周的葬礼的最新一步。

items.title: Farage Resigns and Says He Will Run Again in Special Election
items.summary: Nigel Farage, leader of the populist right-wing party Reform U.K., has come under increasing pressure after a series of revelations about undisclosed gifts and donations.

items.title: Suspect in Monaco Bombing Attack Is Found Dead in Ukraine
items.summary: The Ukrainian authorities said that Anastasiia Berezovska, who officials said was behind the explosion last week, had been shot.
items.title_zh: 摩纳哥爆炸袭击案嫌疑人在乌克兰被发现死亡
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰当局表示，官方称上周爆炸的幕后黑手阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡 (Anastasiia Berezovska) 已被枪杀。

items.title: Prince Harry Loses Privacy Lawsuit Against Daily Mail Publisher
items.summary: The case brought by Harry and other celebrities against Associated Newspapers was one of several legal battles that the prince has fought against British tabloids in recent years.

items.summary_zh: 哈里和其他名人对联合报业提起的诉讼是王子近年来与英国小报进行的几起法律诉讼之一。

items.summary: President Trump had pushed to allow an American player to take the field despite a red card suspension, and the trouncing of the U.S. team was painted as a sign of justice.

items.title: NATO Allies Show Trump They Are Trying to Pay Up for Defense
items.summary: Some countries are making significant progress on raising their military spending. A few are stretching the definition of military spending to try to meet their targets.

items.title: Former Tether investment chief is looking to sell part of his stake in the stablecoin giant: Bloomberg

items.title: Coinbase secures UK authorization to offer traditional investments alongside crypto
items.summary: The license allows institutional traders to access perpetual futures and gives U.K. retail customers the ability to trade equities to begin with.

items.title: Bernstein maintains $36 TeraWulf target after $19 billion, 20-year Anthropic lease
items.summary: Bernstein held its $36 TeraWulf price target after the miner's $19 billion Anthropic lease and $530 million sale of its Abernathy JV stake.

items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
